profiles.name: 01 Social & Comms
profiles.description: Productivity profile for interacting with Discord, Slack, or Zoom while playing an instrument. Button A types a quick ready-message. Buttons B and C send the Discord/Slack default mute (Ctrl+Shift+M) and deafen (Ctrl+Shift+D) shortcuts — configure these in your app's Keybinds settings. Button D takes a screenshot.

A.name: Quick Msg — types text
A.value: Starting now, see you in the chat!
